data.body:
Vance, like many, reads Just War Theory from a post-Enlightenment perspective, asking when states have the right to use force. 

But as I tell students, you have to read Aquinas in context. There are no rights! And it’s not about states! There are sins and duties. And it’s about the king’s soul.
